## Checklist

- [ ] `node --check` passes on changed scripts (and `--input-type=module` for modules)
- [ ] Manually loaded the extension (Load unpacked) and verified the change
- [ ] No real API keys or credentials are included anywhere in the diff
- [ ] Manifest `description` is still ≤ 132 characters (if manifest changed)
- [ ] Keeps the authorized-use framing and disclaimers intact
